name: Kugel with Cherve, Scallions & Chives
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped scallions, with some green
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Thoroughly butter a 12x9 baking dish.
3. Bring a large pot of salted water to a brisk boil.
4. Add noodles and cook just until tender, about 10 minutes. Drain thoroughly and cool.
5. In a large mixing bowl, blend cottage cheese, chevre, and sour cream.
6. Add scallions, chives, salt, pepper, melted butter, and beaten eggs. Blend thoroughly.
7. Fold in noodles and blend well.
8. Pour into the prepared baking dish.
9. Bake for 1 hour or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
